=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (8:18-8:21) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

[D2] (12:9-12:12) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

[D3] (16:18-16:21) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn((what) => { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return {
    log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D1] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return {
    log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D1] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return {
    log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D2] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D2] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
    return Effect.log(what);
})
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    })
}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return {
    log: Effect.fn(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    })
}


=== [D3] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"MyService.log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return {
    log: Effect.fn("MyService.log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    })
}


=== [D3] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"log\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredLayerThis.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

export class MyService extends Context.Service<MyService, {
  log: (_what: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
}>()("MyService") {
    static layer = Layer.effect(this, Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* Effect.log("log")
        return { log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what) }
    }))

    static layerSucceed = Layer.succeed(this)({
        log: (what: string) => Effect.log(what)
    })

    static layerSync = Layer.sync(this)(() => {
        return {
    log: Effect.fn("log")(function (what: string) {
        return Effect.log(what);
    })
};
    })
}
